market_regime: Neutral-to-risk-on: US-Iran ceasefire relief rally, VIX=18 (down from 35), SPY+3.5% 5d, tech leading, geopolitical headline risk remains elevated

scanner_blind_spots.reason: Negative beta -0.67 portfolio hedge — scanner filters out negative-momentum/negative-correlation stocks. 80% EPS estimate revision and $22.6B FCF make this the top macro hedge in the universe. Scanner cannot identify portfolio construction properties.

$4.3B in Patriot contracts awarded in 8 days requires reading DoD procurement PRs in real-time. Scanner cannot scrape PIID database. Q1 earnings April 21 = imminent catalyst that human discovery found via conflict defense monitoring.

Utility sector screened out by scanner growth filters. Microsoft + Meta 20-year nuclear PPAs create a unique revenue model that looks like a utility but has growth company cash flows. Human discovery identified via AI infrastructure power demand thesis.

DoD $400M equity investment with 10-year price floor requires reading government announcements — not in fundamental databases. A stock with negative FCF and a government-backed floor pricing is a unique setup that scanners cannot model.

Micro-cap below scanner $1B market cap threshold. CEO+CFO+Director cluster buy post-earnings selloff is a textbook insider conviction signal that fundamental scanners miss at small-cap scale. $220M cash vs $526M cap = EV of $300M for 87% gross margin IP business.

VMware-to-Nutanix displacement wave is a channel-level insight (enterprise resellers reporting migration activity) not visible in fundamental data. Scanner scored Nutanix down historically when it was pre-profit and never recalibrated after profitability turn.

Executive departure-driven selloff created a sentiment/fundamentals divergence that scanners read as fundamental deterioration. Atlas 29% growth and FCF positive are visible in the data — but the scanner's scoring penalized the stock for declining price and management noise.

Qatar Ras Laffan disruption analysis required reading geopolitical news from April 2026 — Citi/JPMorgan upgrades to $330-338 were issued after the conflict. Scanner using pre-conflict data had outdated fundamentals. Real-time geopolitical overlay is a discovery edge.

PDUFA date postponement from March to June 29 appears as 'no catalyst' in automated calendar scrapers. Discovery team identified the postponement as a better entry window — the catalyst is now more precisely dated and the entry price improved.

$2.8M institutional OTM call staggering across multiple strikes on April 9 is an options flow signal requiring real-time options data analysis — not in the fundamental scanner pipeline. Multi-strike accumulation indicates a fund systematically building a position.
